commands.review_summary:
The PR derives a run-local Tool Search config for `localModelLean` embedded agent runs, threads it through Tool Search cataloging/tool construction, and updates focused tests plus local-model docs.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +82, Docs +2. Total +116 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a PR that changes an experimental default rather than a standalone bug report. Source inspection shows current main does not derive Tool Search from lean mode, and the branch adds focused tests for the new default.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- default `agents.*.experimental.localModelLean` to compact Tool Search controls when no operator `tools.toolSearch` preference is set
- keep explicit `tools.toolSearch` configuration authoritative, including `false`
- document the local-model lean default so small/local model users get a smaller prompt-facing tool catalog without losing tool reachability

Relates to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: Lean local-model agents no longer receive a huge direct tool catalog by default when Tool Search can compact it behind `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, and `tool_call`.

Real environment tested: focused Vitest wrapper, docs formatting, diff check, and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot
node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Evidence after fix: refreshed head `8e4648cf39662008936cfd7ea07cb2474f617f67`; focused local wrapper passed `68/68` tests; docs formatting and diff checks passed. AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed with provider `aws`, lease `cbx_43caf7e452b1`, slug `pearl-barnacle`, run `run_730407402e69`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, `leaseStopped=true`, selected lanes `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`.

Observed result after fix: `localModelLean` applies compact Tool Search defaults only when the operator did not configure Tool Search, and the embedded runner uses the derived runtime config for control-tool exposure and cataloging.

What was not tested: live local model API runs were not rerun in this focused config/defaulting PR.
target.author: vincentkoc
